matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101001011 5
1 011101000 4
2 001111111 7
3 000001011 3
4 010110100 4
5 010101111 6
6 011001110 5
7 001010010 3

67 76 011111111 8
70 07 001111111 7 match 2

13 31 011111110 7
